Package org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.mbGoal

Class MembershipGoalRules

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.seqprover.eventbExtensions.mbGoal.MembershipGoalRules
public class MembershipGoalRules extends Object
Internal rules used by the Membership Goal reasoner for justification.
